commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Telegram-specific cron form validation that rejects non-numeric announce delivery targets and adds an English error string.

PR surface: Source +7. Total +7 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction for the PR defect: current docs/runtime accept topic-qualified Telegram targets, while the new dashboard regex rejects them before save. I did not run the browser UI in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the compatibility-sensitive target validation before any merge or repair automation.

target.title: fix(cron): validate Telegram delivery target is numeric chat ID
target.body:
fix(cron): validate Telegram delivery target is numeric chat ID

## Summary
**Problem:** The cron dashboard accepted arbitrary text for Telegram announce delivery "To" field, causing runtime failures with "Telegram recipient must be a numeric chat ID".

**Fix:** Add validation that checks if the target is a numeric chat ID when the delivery channel is Telegram.

**Out of scope:** No changes to other delivery channels or cron job execution.

## Linked context
Closes #90467

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Cron dashboard accepts non-numeric text for Telegram delivery target, causing runtime failures
- Real environment tested: Windows 10, Node.js v22.11.0, OpenClaw latest main
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Verified the validation logic rejects non-numeric Telegram targets
- Evidence after fix: Code change in `ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.ts`:
```typescript
// Before: no validation for Telegram delivery target

// After:
if (form.deliveryMode === "announce" && form.deliveryChannel === "telegram") {
  const target = form.deliveryTo.trim();
  if (target && !/^-?\d+$/.test(target)) {
    errors.deliveryTo = "cron.errors.telegramChatIdRequired";
  }
}
```
- Observed result after fix: Non-numeric Telegram delivery targets will show validation error before saving
- What was not tested: Live cron job creation with Telegram delivery (requires Telegram bot setup)

## Tests and validation
- No code changes beyond the validation logic
- No CHANGELOG.md edits

## Risk checklist
- userVisible: Yes (cron dashboard now validates Telegram delivery targets)
- configEnvMigration: No
- securityAuthNetwork: No
- Mitigation: Only adds validation; no behavior change for valid numeric chat IDs

## Current review state
- [x] AI-assisted (built with Claude Code)
